briefdescription.para: face can have neighbor only via edge
face can have neighbor via vertex
Face incidence type.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, FaceId id, FaceIncidence incidence=FaceIncidence::PerEdge, const UndirectedEdgeBitSet *isCompBd={})
memberdef.name: getComponent

detaileddescription.para: returns one connected component containing given face, not effective to call more than once, if several components are needed use getAllComponents
returns one connected component containing given vertex, not effective to call more than once, if several components are needed use getAllComponentsVerts

briefdescription.para: returns the largest by number of elements component
returns the union of vertex connected components, each having at least

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, FaceIncidence incidence=FaceIncidence::PerEdge, const UndirectedEdgeBitSet *isCompBd={}, float minArea=0, int *numSmallerComponents=nullptr)
memberdef.name: getLargestComponent

briefdescription.para: returns the largest by surface area component or empty set if its area is smaller than

parameterdescription.para: optional output: the number of components in addition to returned one

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, const FaceBitSet &seeds, FaceIncidence incidence=FaceIncidence::PerEdge, const UndirectedEdgeBitSet *isCompBd={})
memberdef.name: getComponents

briefdescription.para: returns union of connected components, each of which contains at least one seed face

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const FaceBitSet &seeds, const FaceBitSet *region=nullptr, FaceIncidence incidence=FaceIncidence::PerEdge, const UndirectedEdgeBitSet *isCompBd={})
memberdef.name: getComponents

briefdescription.para: returns the union of connected components, each having at least given area

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, UnionFind< FaceId > &unionFind, float minArea, UndirectedEdgeBitSet *outBdEdgesBetweenLargeComps=nullptr)
memberdef.name: getLargeByAreaComponents

briefdescription.para: given prepared union-find structure returns the union of connected components, each having at least given area
expands given seeds to whole components
returns requested number of largest by area connected components in descending by area order

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, float minArea, float angleFromPlanar, UndirectedEdgeBitSet *outBdEdgesBetweenLargeComps=nullptr)
memberdef.name: getLargeByAreaSmoothComponents

detaileddescription.para: returns the union of connected components, each having at least given area, and any two faces in a connected component have a path along the surface across the edges, where surface does not deviate from plane more than on given angle

briefdescription.para: returns union of connected components, each of which contains at least one seed vert
returns the number of connected components in mesh part

detaileddescription.para:
gets all connected components of mesh part
be careful, if mesh is large enough and has many components, the memory overflow will occur

memberdef.definition: MRMESH_API std::pair< std::vector< FaceBitSet >, int > MR::MeshComponents::getAllComponents
memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, int maxComponentCount, FaceIncidence incidence=FaceIncidence::PerEdge, const UndirectedEdgeBitSet *isCompBd={})
memberdef.name: getAllComponents

detaileddescription.para:
gets all connected components of mesh part \detail if components number more than the maxComponentCount, they will be combined into groups of the same size
maxComponentCount
should be more then 1
pair components bitsets vector and number components in one group if components number more than maxComponentCount

memberdef.argsstring: (Face2RegionMap &componentsMap, int componentsCount, const FaceBitSet &region, int maxComponentCount)
memberdef.name: getAllComponents

detaileddescription.para:
gets all connected components from components map ( FaceId => RegionId ) \detail if components number more than the maxComponentCount, they will be combined into groups of the same size (this similarly changes componentsMap)
maxComponentCount
should be more then 1
components bitsets vector

gets all connected components of mesh part as
the mapping: FaceId -> Component ID in [0, 1, 2, ...)
the total number of components

briefdescription.para: computes the area of each region given via the map

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, const Face2RegionMap &regionMap, int numRegions, float minArea)
memberdef.name: getLargeByAreaRegions

detaileddescription.para:
returns
the union of all regions with area >= minArea
the number of such regions

briefdescription.para: gets all connected components of mesh part
gets all connected components, separating vertices by given path (either closed or from boundary to boundary)
gets all connected components, separating vertices by given paths (either closed or from boundary to boundary)
subdivides given edges on connected components
subdivides given edges on connected components
returns true if all vertices of a mesh connected component are present in selection
if all vertices of a mesh connected component are present in selection, excludes these vertices
gets union-find structure for faces with different options of face-connectivity

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshTopology &topology, const FaceBitSet *region=nullptr, FaceIncidence incidence=FaceIncidence::PerEdge, const UndirectedEdgeBitSet *isCompBd={})
memberdef.name: getUnionFindStructureFaces

detaileddescription.para: gets union-find structure for faces with connectivity by shared edge, and optional edge predicate whether to skip uniting components over it it is guaranteed that isCompBd is invoked in a thread-safe manner (that left and right face are always processed by one thread)

briefdescription.para: gets union-find structure for vertices
gets union-find structure for vertices, considering connections by given edges only
gets union-find structure for vertices, considering connections by given undirected edges only
gets union-find structure for vertices, considering connections by all edges excluding given ones
gets union-find structure for vertices, separating vertices by given path (either closed or from boundary to boundary)

parameterdescription.para: this set receives all vertices passed by the path

detaileddescription.para:
gets union-find structure for all undirected edges in
mesh
allPointToRoots
if true, then every element in the structure will point directly to the root of its respective component

briefdescription.para: returns union of connected components, each of which contains at least one seed edge
